name: PostgreSQL
description: Read-only database access with schema inspection capabilities

tools.name: query
tools.description: Run a read-only SQL query against the PostgreSQL database

tools.name: list_tables
tools.description: List all tables in the database with their schemas

schema.description: Schema name to filter by (default: public)

tools.name: describe_table
tools.description: Get the schema information for a specific table

tableName.description: Name of the table to describe
